tables.description: Subject ID, subject ancestry, age at diagnosis, tumor description including tumor behavior, tumor grade, tumor histology, tumor status of sample, primary site of tumor, and indicator if analyzed in European GWAS by FOCI of participants with or without ovarian cancer and involved in the "Follow-up of Ovarian Cancer Genetic Association and Interaction Studies (FOCI)" project.

variables.name: ANCESTRY
variables.description: Intercontinental ancestry as assigned by LAMP. 90 % was used for European, 80% for African and Asian, respectively. The remaining samples were categorized as Other ethnic group.

variables.name: EUR_GWAS
variables.description: Indicator if analyzed in European GWAS by FOCI

variables.name: PRIMARY_SITE
variables.description: Primary cancer site or control status

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, indicator for worse duplicates for sample, and indicator for failed QC criterion of participants with or without ovarian cancer and involved in the "Follow-up of Ovarian Cancer Genetic Association and Interaction Studies (FOCI)" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: EXCLUDE_QC
variables.description: Indicator for failed QC criterion: call rate less than 95%, extreme heterozygosity

variables.name: EXCL_WORSEDUP
variables.description: Indicator for worse duplicates for sample, to be removed from primary analysis

variables.name: FAIL_SEXCHECK
variables.description: Indicator for failed sex check from plink --sex-check option (i.e. >80% male calls)
